pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-019 (AI and Machine Learning) scores 0.453 composite (signal: moderate). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.453 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI and Machine Learning KSA AI-T-019 as a discrete competency for Cloud Data Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Cloud Data Architect market data. AI content is governance/risk/compliance, not cloud data architecture. Score 0.453 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI content is governance/risk/compliance, not cloud data architecture. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: AI content is governance/risk/compliance, not cloud data architecture.
